page_content:
CBMG688 Special Topics in Cell Biology and Molecular Genetics (1-4 Credits)

Presentation and discussion of fundamental problems and special subjects in the topics of Cell Biology and Molecular Genetics. Formerly: MICB688.

CBMG699 Special Problems in Cell Biology and Molecular Genetics (1-3 Credits)

Emphasis is placed on research and discussion of current problems in the area of Cell Biology and Molecular Genetics.

Repeatable to: 10 credits if content differs.
